props.name: error
props.description: Error text displayed under the form field. Leave blank to indicate a valid field. Accepts a string or ReactNode for custom error content.

props.name: helpText
props.description: Help text displayed under the form field to provide additional explanation. Accepts a string or ReactNode for custom help content.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the id attribute on the form item element.

props.name: label
props.description: Creates a label for the form item.

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Sets the label size. 'regular' for standard, 'large' for emphasis.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the form item.

props.name: name
props.description: Overrides the label value within the form-summary to provide a shorter description. For public-form use only.

props.name: requirement
props.description: Marks the field with an optional or required label indicator.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: Specifies the input type for appropriate message spacing. Used with checkbox-list or radio-group.

slots.name: error
slots.description: Error text displayed under the form field. Leave blank to indicate a valid field. Accepts a string or ReactNode for custom error content.

slots.name: helpText
slots.description: Help text displayed under the form field to provide additional explanation. Accepts a string or ReactNode for custom help content.
